raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a two-stage training pipeline combining a discrete variational autoencoder (dVAE) for compressing images into 32×32 image tokens (8192-value vocabulary) and a 12-billion-parameter autoregressive transformer that jointly models text and image tokens autoregressively. Enables zero-shot text-to-image generation without fine-tuning on held-out datasets
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 250 million internet-collected text-image pairs (excluding MS-COCO but including Conceptual Captions + filtered YFCC100M subset)
raw_extraction.application: High-fidelity zero-shot image generation, text-conditioned visual creativity, and rudimentary image-to-image translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Zero-shot text-to-image synthesis with minimal reliance on labeled training data
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Joint autoregressive modeling of text and image tokens (factored as p(x|y,z)·p(y,z))
